//: Site Watch targets. Each entry is ONE web page that Playwright renders on a schedule; if its content changed since the last run, Claude Code summarises the diff and the change is filed as a GitHub Issue (+ optional Slack line). Edit this list freely.

//fields.slug: stable id (a-z0-9-); names the snapshot file snapshots/<slug>.txt and the issue label watch:<slug>. Do NOT change it later or the baseline resets.
//fields.name: human-readable title shown in the Issue and Slack line.
//fields.selector: OPTIONAL CSS selector. When set, only the text of matching elements is tracked (great for pulling the story titles out of a busy page). Omit to track the whole page body.
//fields.wait_until: OPTIONAL Playwright load state before snapshotting: load | domcontentloaded | networkidle | commit. Default domcontentloaded.
//fields.enabled: OPTIONAL bool, default true. Set false to pause a target without deleting it.
